name: HTS_GLOBAL_SETUPS_B_
description: Base table containing Schedule Global Setup Options used by diffrent schedule apllications.

columns.Name: SETUP_PARAM_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Global Setup Options

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Standard Enterprise Identifier column for multi tenancy support

columns.Name: PARAMETER_CODE
columns.Comments: The parameter unique code. Used as Alternate Key

columns.Name: VALUE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The value type indicates whether the value is in number, text, or date format.

columns.Name: VALUE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: stores the parameter numerical value

columns.Name: VALUE_TEXT
columns.Comments: stores the parameter text value

columns.Name: VALUE_DATE
columns.Comments: stores the parameter date value

columns.Name: LIST_OF_VALUES_SRC
columns.Comments: Source of Value List

columns.Name: LIST_OF_VALUES_NAME
columns.Comments: Lookup type or View name

columns.Name: PARAMETER_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Parameter category

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
